Clidemia purdiei is a plant species that belongs to the family Melastomataceae, commonly known as the melastome family. Clidemia purdiei is a shrub that is native to Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties.

The plant is known for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. It has been used to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, headache, and skin infections. The health benefits of Clidemia purdiei include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. 

The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures.
